name: @panctl/cli
description: Multi-agent orchestration for AI coding assistants (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini CLI)
author: Edward Becker <edward.becker@mindyournow.com>

scripts.build: npm run build:contracts && npm run build:cli && npm run build:scripts && npm run build:dashboard
scripts.build:cli: node scripts/build-cli.mjs && mkdir -p dist/cli/caveman/skills/caveman dist/cli/caveman/skills/caveman-review dist/cli/caveman-compress && cp src/lib/caveman/*.js src/lib/caveman/caveman-statusline.sh dist/cli/caveman/ && cp src/lib/caveman/skills/caveman/SKILL.md dist/cli/caveman/skills/caveman/ && cp src/lib/caveman/skills/caveman-review/SKILL.md dist/cli/caveman/skills/caveman-review/ && cp src/lib/caveman/compress/*.py dist/cli/caveman-compress/
scripts.build:contracts: rm -rf packages/contracts/dist && cd packages/contracts && npm run build
scripts.build:dashboard: npm run build:dashboard:frontend && npm run build:dashboard:server
scripts.build:dashboard:server: npm run build:contracts && cd src/dashboard/server && npm run build && mkdir -p ../../../dist/dashboard/prompts && cp ../../lib/cloister/prompts/*.md ../../../dist/dashboard/prompts/
scripts.build:desktop: cd apps/desktop && bun run build && bun run dist:linux && bun run dist:mac && bun run dist:win
scripts.build:desktop:linux: cd apps/desktop && bun run build && bun run dist:linux
scripts.build:desktop:mac: cd apps/desktop && bun run build && bun run dist:mac
scripts.build:desktop:win: cd apps/desktop && bun run build && bun run dist:win
